# Node Protocol - IPv4

## Filter by subnet

Example: Equal IP subnet

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_proto_ipv4.subnet:iserver.output.default
```

Example: Contain IP subnet

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_proto_ipv4.longer:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_proto_ipv4.subnet:devel.debug
```
